name: ASRock B650 PRO RS ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - M.2 Key-E for WiFi - Support DDR5-6200+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DP 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C (Front)
shortName: ASRock B650 PRO RS ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16
description: ASRock B650 Pro RS ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with DDR5 support, PCIe 4.0, and WiFi M.2 slot.
